---
title: "Architecture Decision Records — Index"
subtitle: "All UIAO ADRs (canonical decisions and their rationale)"
date: 2026-05-14
---

::: {.callout-note}
The UIAO Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) are the canonical
record of architectural decisions, their context, and their
consequences. Each ADR is published verbatim from its canonical
source under [`src/uiao/canon/adr/`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/tree/main/src/uiao/canon/adr).

The publication mechanism — `{{< include >}}` wrappers + this index
— is governed by [ADR-068](adr-068-canon-publication-policy.qmd).
:::

| ADR | Title | Status | Decided |
|---|---|---|---|
| [ADR-001](adr-001-haadj-deprecated-entra-join-only.qmd) | HAADJ Deprecated — Entra ID Join as Sole Device Join Target | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-28 |
| [ADR-002](adr-002-arc-entra-join-no-domain-join.qmd) | Arc-Enabled Servers Require Non-Domain-Joined State | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-28 |
| [ADR-003](adr-003-api-driven-inbound-provisioning.qmd) | API-Driven Inbound Provisioning as HR-Agnostic Canonical Path | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-28 |
| [ADR-004](adr-004-workload-identity-federation-default.qmd) | Workload Identity Federation as Default for External Integrations | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-28 |
| [ADR-005](adr-005-canonical-claim-schema.qmd) | ADR-005: Canonical Claim Schema | ACCEPTED | 2026-01-15 |
| [ADR-006](adr-006-evidence-determinism.qmd) | ADR-006: Evidence Determinism | ACCEPTED | 2026-01-15 |
| [ADR-007](adr-007-multi-cloud-adapter.qmd) | ADR-007: Multi-Cloud Adapter Model | ACCEPTED | 2026-01-20 |
| [ADR-008](adr-008-zero-trust-identity.qmd) | ADR-008: Zero-Trust Identity Anchoring | ACCEPTED | 2026-01-22 |
| [ADR-009](adr-009-drift-ledger-immutability.qmd) | ADR-009: Drift Ledger Immutability | ACCEPTED | 2026-01-22 |
| [ADR-010](adr-010-vendor-baseline-versioning.qmd) | ADR-010: Vendor Baseline Versioning | ACCEPTED | 2026-01-25 |
| [ADR-011](adr-011-multi-adapter-correlation.qmd) | ADR-011: Multi-Adapter Correlation | ACCEPTED | 2026-01-28 |
| [ADR-012](adr-012-canonical-drift-taxonomy.qmd) | ADR-012: Canonical Drift Taxonomy | ACCEPTED | 2026-02-01 |
| [ADR-013](adr-013-adapter-failure-isolation.qmd) | ADR-013: Adapter Failure Isolation | ACCEPTED | 2026-02-03 |
| [ADR-014](adr-014-evidence-severity-model.qmd) | ADR-014: Evidence Severity Model | ACCEPTED | 2026-02-05 |
| [ADR-015](adr-015-adapter-extensibility.qmd) | ADR-015: Adapter Extensibility | ACCEPTED | 2026-02-08 |
| [ADR-016](adr-016-evidence-bundle-lifecycle.qmd) | ADR-016: Evidence Bundle Lifecycle | ACCEPTED | 2026-02-10 |
| [ADR-017](adr-017-adapter-sandbox-execution.qmd) | ADR-017: Adapter Sandbox Execution | ACCEPTED | 2026-02-12 |
| [ADR-018](adr-018-mission-channel-enforcement.qmd) | ADR-018: Mission Channel Enforcement | ACCEPTED | 2026-02-15 |
| [ADR-019](adr-019-vendor-failure-containment.qmd) | ADR-019: Vendor Failure Containment | ACCEPTED | 2026-02-18 |
| [ADR-020](adr-020-evidence-correlation-determinism.qmd) | Evidence Correlation Determinism | PROPOSED | 2026-04-07 |
| [ADR-021](adr-021-adapter-hot-swap-rollback.qmd) | ADR-021: Adapter Hot-Swap and Rollback | ACCEPTED | 2026-02-22 |
| [ADR-022](adr-022-evidence-compression.qmd) | ADR-022: Evidence Compression | ACCEPTED | 2026-02-25 |
| [ADR-023](adr-023-adapter-concurrency.qmd) | ADR-023: Adapter Concurrency | ACCEPTED | 2026-03-01 |
| [ADR-024](adr-024-evidence-diffing.qmd) | ADR-024: Evidence Diffing | ACCEPTED | 2026-03-03 |
| [ADR-025](adr-025-adapter-health-liveness.qmd) | ADR-025: Adapter Health and Liveness | ACCEPTED | 2026-03-05 |
| [ADR-026](adr-026-evidence-lifecycle-guarantees.qmd) | ADR-026: Evidence Lifecycle Guarantees | ACCEPTED | 2026-03-08 |
| [ADR-027](adr-027-adapter-retirement.qmd) | ADR-027: Adapter Retirement | ACCEPTED | 2026-03-10 |
| [ADR-028](adr-028-monorepo-consolidation-gos-integration.qmd) | ADR-028: Monorepo Consolidation and Integration of uiao-gos | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-17 |
| [ADR-029](adr-029-substrate-v1-ready-for-release.qmd) | ADR-029: Substrate v1 Ready for Release | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-17 |
| [ADR-030](adr-030-pre-uiao-terminology-reconciliation.qmd) | ADR-030: Reconcile Pre-UIAO Terminology with Canon | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-17 |
| [ADR-030](adr-033-gcc-boundary-drift-class.qmd) | GCC Boundary Drift Class and Compensating Controls Architecture | PROPOSED | 2026-04-19 |
| [ADR-031](adr-031-namespace-package-rename.qmd) | ADR-031: Rename Python Package uiao_impl to uiao.impl (PEP 420 Namespace) | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-17 |
| [ADR-031](adr-034-three-plane-device-model.qmd) | Three-Plane Device Model and OrgPath Plane-Aware Architecture | PROPOSED | 2026-04-20 |
| [ADR-032](adr-032-single-package-consolidation.qmd) | ADR-032: Single-Package Consolidation — flatten src/uiao/ | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-20 |
| [ADR-035](adr-035-orgpath-codebook-binding.qmd) | OrgPath Codebook — Executable Canon Binding | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-20 |
| [ADR-036](adr-036-dynamic-group-provisioning.qmd) | Dynamic Group Library — Executable Canon + Entra Provisioning Adapter | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-20 |
| [ADR-037](adr-037-admin-unit-provisioning.qmd) | Delegation Matrix — Executable Canon + Entra AU/Role Provisioning Adapter | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-20 |
| [ADR-038](adr-038-device-plane-orgpath.qmd) | Device-Plane OrgPath Provisioning — Graph + ARM Dual-Transport Adapter | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-20 |
| [ADR-039](adr-039-policy-targeting.qmd) | OrgTree Policy Targeting — Intune + Azure Policy Dual Transport | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-20 |
| [ADR-040](adr-040-drift-engine.qmd) | OrgTree Drift Detection Engine — Six-Phase Orchestrator | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-20 |
| [ADR-041](adr-041-uiao-git-infrastructure.qmd) | UIAO Git Infrastructure — Self-Hosted Git on Windows Server 2025 + IIS | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-12 |
| [ADR-042](adr-042-ad-computer-conversion-guide-integration.qmd) | AD Computer Conversion Guide — Canonical Input to Phase 4 Device Planes | draft | 2026-04-20 |
| [ADR-043](adr-043-fedramp-rfc-0026-ca7-integration.qmd) | FedRAMP RFC-0026 (CA-7 Continuous Monitoring Expectations) — UIAO Integration | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-21 |
| [ADR-044](adr-044-substrate-governance-realignment.qmd) | Substrate Governance Realignment to Post-ADR-032 Single Package | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-23 |
| [ADR-045](adr-045-scan-redaction-policy.qmd) | Scan Artifact Redaction Policy for Multi-Agency Distribution | PROPOSED | 2026-04-23 |
| [ADR-046](adr-046-cli-surface-convention.qmd) | CLI Surface Convention: Sub-App-per-Domain | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-23 |
| [ADR-047](adr-047-continuous-monitoring-program.qmd) | ADR-047: Continuous Monitoring Program and Customer Documentation Platform Architecture | PROPOSED | 2026-04-14 |
| [ADR-047](adr-047-fedramp-20x-integration.qmd) | FedRAMP 20x Integration — KSI emission and Minimum Assessment Scope adoption | PROPOSED | 2026-04-27 |
| [ADR-047](adr-047-network-aaa-adapter-registration.qmd) | Network AAA Adapter Registration and Control-Library `implemented_by` Closure | PROPOSED | 2026-05-07 |
| [ADR-048](adr-048-orgpath-attribute-selection.qmd) | ADR‑048: OrgPath Attribute Selection — extensionAttributes over Custom Security Attributes | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-28 |
| [ADR-049](adr-049-microsoft-adapter-coverage-expansion.qmd) | Microsoft Modernization Adapter Coverage Expansion — Defender Suite, Azure Migrate, Azure Policy for Arc, Entra Governance, Entra Workload ID, Intune-Modernization | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-30 |
| [ADR-050](adr-050-reference-middleware-implementation-choices.qmd) | D3.1 Reference Middleware — Runtime, Language, Packaging, and Test Choices | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-30 |
| [ADR-051](adr-051-saml-trust-anchor.qmd) | SAML as a Third Trust-Anchor Type for Application Identity | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-04 |
| [ADR-052](adr-052-piv-usaccess-adapter.qmd) | PIV / USAccess Conformance Adapter — Federal Personnel Trust-Anchor Authority | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-04 |
| [ADR-053](adr-053-opm-azure-apim-adapter.qmd) | OPM Azure APIM Integration Adapter — Centralized Federal API Gateway Authority | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-04 |
| [ADR-054](adr-054-single-ato-reciprocity.qmd) | Single-ATO Reciprocity Model — Multi-Tenant Authorization Boundary | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-04 |
| [ADR-055](adr-055-customer-identity-canon-block.qmd) | Customer Identity Canon Block — KYC Protocol & Reciprocal Attribute Exchange | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-05 |
| [ADR-056](adr-056-login-gov-activation-contract.qmd) | Login.gov Federation Service — Activation Contract (Stage 2) | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-05 |
| [ADR-057](adr-057-thousandeyes-networks-pillar-scope.qmd) | ThousandEyes — Networks-Pillar Conditional Adoption Under GCC-Moderate | PROPOSED | 2026-04-27 |
| [ADR-058](adr-058-microsoft-purview-conformance-adapter-coverage.qmd) | Microsoft Purview Conformance Adapter Coverage — Read-Only Telemetry Slot for Audit, DLP, Information Protection, and Insider Risk State | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-07 |
| [ADR-059](adr-059-sailpoint-adapter-family.qmd) | SailPoint NERM Adapter — Boundary-Exception Carve-Out and Slot Allocation | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-07 |
| [ADR-060](adr-060-mod-namespace-flatten-into-uiao-canon.qmd) | Flatten MOD_xxx Namespace into UIAO_NNN Canon — Single-Registry Consolidation | PROPOSED | 2026-05-10 |
| [ADR-061](adr-061-fedramp-cr26-catalog-vendoring.qmd) | FedRAMP CR26 Catalog Vendoring — Authority Posture, Pin Discipline, and Optional `oscal-cli` Round-Trip | PROPOSED | 2026-05-10 |
| [ADR-062](adr-062-orgpath-depth-extension.qmd) | OrgPath Hierarchy Depth Extension — 4 Levels to 8 Levels | ACCEPTED | 2026-04-26 |
| [ADR-063](adr-063-orgpath-storage-slot-binding.qmd) | OrgPath Storage Slot — extensionAttribute1 Binding | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-11 |
| [ADR-064](adr-064-drift-schema-slot-occupied-subclass.qmd) | DRIFT-SCHEMA::slot-occupied — Sub-class for Pre-existing Non-OrgPath Values | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-11 |
| [ADR-065](adr-065-hrit-productization-mission.qmd) | HRIT Single-ATO Productization as v0.6.0 Mission Theme | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-11 |
| [ADR-066](adr-066-application-aware-networking-and-token-bound-transport.qmd) | Application-Aware Networking and Token-Bound Transport Plane | PROPOSED | 2026-05-05 |
| [ADR-067](adr-067-ad-security-group-rationalization.qmd) | AD Security Group Rationalization — Distribution Lists, Mail-Enabled Groups, and Nested-Group Flattening | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-13 |
| [ADR-068](adr-068-kerberos-ntlm-elimination.qmd) | Kerberos / NTLM Elimination — Cloud Kerberos Trust, Certificate-Based Auth, and the NTLM Deprecation Timeline | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-13 |
| [ADR-069](adr-069-ldap-dependent-application-migration.qmd) | LDAP-Dependent Application Migration — Four-Class Migration Pattern (App Proxy, SAML, OIDC, Domain Services) | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-13 |
| [ADR-070](adr-070-foundational-primacy-charter-tier.qmd) | Foundational Primacy — Charter Tier and Amendment Process | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-15 |
| [ADR-071](adr-071-intune-first-asset-onboarding.qmd) | Intune-First Asset Onboarding — All-Platform Doctrine for Net-New Assets | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-14 |
| [ADR-072](adr-072-canon-publication-policy.qmd) | Canon Publication Policy — `publish_to_site` Frontmatter Field and Publication-Gap Scanner | ACCEPTED | 2026-05-14 |
| [ADR-INDEX](adr-index.qmd) | Architectural Decision Records — Index | Current | 2026-04-28 |
